functionalities: - :App: should accept a single command-line argument "--menu" and, when given, print every :MenuItem: in :Menu: grouped by Category, showing each item's Name and Price.
- :App: should accept a command-line argument that exactly matches a :MenuItem: Name and print that item's Name, Description, Price, and Category.

- :App: should accept an optional second argument "--narrate" alongside a valid :MenuItem: Name. When ELEVENLABS_API_KEY and ELEVENLABS_VOICE_ID are both set, :App: should call the ElevenLabs text-to-speech API to synthesize that item's Description into spoken audio, save it to a file named "narration.mp3" in the current directory, and print a confirmation message.

- :App: should treat "--narrate" as optional and degrade gracefully: if ELEVENLABS_API_KEY or ELEVENLABS_VOICE_ID is missing, :App: should skip narration entirely, print a message that narration is unavailable in this environment, and still exit with status code 0 for the underlying menu item lookup.

- :App: should accept an optional "--json" flag alongside any other arguments and, when present, print its result as a single JSON object to stdout instead of human-readable text, for "--menu", "--item", and "--narrate".
